description: PR-mined: modeled after the real upstream commit 89fe30473e88a1adf8354c6b607c2c0515d8cfba 'docs: update the doc of IntPair' (Rosemoe, 2025-12-13 -- a direct maintainer commit, not routed through a PR; verified via GitHub's commits/{sha}/pulls API returning no associated PR), which documented/grew IntPair's small pure-function helper set (packIntFloat/getSecondAsFloat). That exact commit is already baked into our pinned commit (43f7e8e2981...), so a literal forward-patch of its diff is a no-op against this baseline. This edit reproduces the same real transformation (growing IntPair's helper set with a small doc'd pure function) with the natural next helper: swap().
